title: taraxacum laeticeps
intro: Taraxacum laeticeps, also known as the yellow dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Taraxacum laeticeps can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for natural health enthusiasts.
